title: Vulcan (VMC) Forms 'Hammer Chart Pattern': Time for Bottom Fishing?
text: After losing some value lately, a hammer chart pattern has been formed for Vulcan (VMC), indicating that the stock has found support. This, combined with an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions, could lead to a trend reversal for the stock in the near term.

title: VULCAN ANNOUNCES FOURTH QUARTER CONFERENCE CALL
text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala., Jan. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Vulcan Materials Company (NYSE:VMC) will host its fourth quarter earnings conference call on Wednesday, February 16 at 10:00 a.m.

title: MLM or VMC: Which Concrete & Aggregates Stock Should You Buy?
text: Upbeat housing demand and federal infrastructure spending are likely to benefit the Zacks Building Products - Concrete & Aggregates industry. Let's see whether MLM or VMC is a better buy at the moment.
